data.name: Hot Secretary Puzzle
data.detailed_description:
CHECK OUR FRIEND'S GAME 👀


關於此遊戲

Hot Secretary Puzzle is a short puzzle game with a beautiful and hot secretary. High-quality art, relaxing music and spicy atmosphere. Awesome for relax after a day at work.

Features:
• Simple and additive Gameplay
• Original HD Artworks
• Relaxing music
• The best way to spend your night alone!
data.about_the_game:

data.short_description: Hot Secretary Puzzle - is a simple yet tempting 2D puzzle game about the pleasure of having a secretary. But not a regular, a hot one!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 98, ME, 2000, XP and Vista, 7
  • 處理器: 500 MHz
  • 記憶體: 256 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 100 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 98, ME, 2000, XP and Vista, 7
  • 處理器: 1000 MHz
  • 記憶體: 1000 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
